channel.title: Dimension 20
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 on Dropout.tv

item.title: Secrets at the South Pole Station
item.description:
In the hunt for clues to Zood, the crew finds MacLeod's lab, where more than just research awaits.

Duration: 2:20:21

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: The Path Out of Gath
item.description:
The crew of the Zephyr find their journey to Zood suddenly interrupted by imperial forces.

Duration: 2:06:49

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: On High We Go
item.description:
A mysterious message reunites the legendary crew of the Zephyr in search of the mythic land of Zood.

Duration: 2:37:44

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
